sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find meaningful non-background objects
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

# Group by color and count
from collections import Counter
color_counts = Counter(n['color'] for n in nodes)
print("Color counts:", dict(color_counts))

# Find non-background objects (larger than 1 pixel or unique colors)
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] > 1 or n['color'] in ['M', 'P', 'R', 'b', 'S', 'Y', 'O', 'r', 'N', 'p']:
        b = n['boundary']
        r_min = min(p[0] for p in b)
        c_min = min(p[1] for p in b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, hash={n['hash'][:8]}, top-left=({r_min},{c_min})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
